description: Create an interactive GeoGebra applet to visualize the logistic growth differential equation dy/dx = r * y * (1 - y/K). The applet must include a slider for the growth rate 'r' (0.1 to 2, increment 0.1) and a slider for the carrying capacity 'K' (1 to 20, increment 1). Visualize the vector field for this ODE and plot at least three solution curves with starting values y(0)=1, y(0)=5, and y(0)=15. Include a text annotation explaining the equilibrium behavior at y=K. Save the project as 'logistic_slopefield.ggb' in ~/Documents/GeoGebra/projects/.
